data.title: Update sprint SKILL.md and task-execution.md for worktree isolation dispatch
data.description:
## Description

Modify sprint SKILL.md Phase 4 (Sub-Agent Launch) to reference the shared worktree-dispatch.md prompt for isolation:worktree dispatch. Also strengthen the no-commit constraint in sprint/prompts/task-execution.md.

### Implementation
1. In Phase 4, before Agent dispatch, add: "Read and apply plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/worktree-dispatch.md for worktree isolation configuration"
2. Add conditional isolation:worktree parameter to each Agent/Task dispatch call
3. In task-execution.md, strengthen the existing no-commit text to explicitly list prohibited actions
4. Add git root verification as first sub-agent action

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (EDIT — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md (EDIT)

### TDD Requirement
RED eval from task T2 must turn GREEN after this implementation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sprint eval passes
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references worktree-dispatch.md
  Verify: grep -q 'worktree-dispatch' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] task-execution.md has strengthened no-commit constraint
  Verify: grep -q 'must NOT.*commit\|Do NOT.*commit' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
